issues: rebalance_frequency is 'daily' but spec frequency is 'weekly'
signal logic uses latest single pct_change but spec requires weekly increase of at least 15% (weekly frequency mismatch)
no explicit handling of weekly aggregation from daily data
position tracking uses internal attribute _position which may not persist correctly across calls
no validation that fetch_google_trends is called with correct allowed kwargs only (days_back=21 is acceptable but not explicitly weekly)
